overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a desert highway during golden hour, featuring Joshua trees, distant mountains, and highway infrastructure. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character walking along the road shoulder and through desert vegetation near an overhead sign gantry.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with Joshua trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder beside the metal guardrail

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt highway stretching into the distance
cluster of yucca trees characteristic of desert landscapes
distant mountain silhouettes against the golden sky
white metal barrier running along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady walk along a desert highway shoulder during golden hour. Joshua trees dot the right side while a metal guardrail lines the left. The distant mountains are silhouetted against the warm afternoon sky as the camera moves forward along the dirt shoulder.

events.description: moves off the paved highway shoulder into the desert scrub and vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through dense desert scrub toward the overhead sign gantry, moving away from the road

entered.detail: large metal highway sign structure spanning across the road
dense low-lying bushes and desert vegetation
large radio telescope or satellite dish visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera veers off the highway shoulder into the desert scrub, approaching a large overhead sign gantry. The vegetation becomes denser as the camera moves through bushes and yucca plants. A large satellite dish becomes visible on the left horizon as the highway recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass area with desert vegetation

events.description: passes underneath the large overhead highway sign gantry
red sports car drives past on the highway to the left

agents.ego_description: continues walking parallel to the highway, passing under the gantry and observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving at high speed along the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera passes directly under the massive overhead sign gantry, which displays 'Night City' directions. A red sports car speeds past on the highway to the left. The camera continues through the desert scrub parallel to the road, with the satellite dish still visible in the distance and the mountains framing the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a steady walk along a highway shoulder into the dense scrub of a desert landscape. It begins by moving forward along a dirt shoulder during golden hour, with Joshua trees to the right and a metal guardrail to the left against a backdrop of silhouetted mountains. As the camera veers off the road, the terrain shifts into thicker desert vegetation and yucca plants, bringing a large satellite dish into view on the left horizon. The scene then progresses under a massive overhead sign gantry directing toward Night City, just as a red sports car speeds past on the adjacent highway. Finally, the camera continues through the scrub parallel to the road, with the distant satellite dish and framing mountains remaining visible under the warm afternoon sky.
